goal: Final qualification of the microstructure-route into one of three honest statuses: confirmed true overlay, confirmed replacement layer, or watchlist/reject.
global_constraints: All comparisons must use active-signal-v1@1 as the sole decision reference; @3 is auxiliary only.
Overlay and replacement tracks must never be mixed in the same narrative or snapshot.
Every threshold must have documented provenance: quantile-based or selection-OOS with frozen lockbox.
All key comparisons must occur on the same window (same-window truth only).
Simple rules (bucket, threshold, quantile) must be tested before any model-based approach.
No re-opening of old routes: IV, breadth, path-asymmetry, regime-disagreement, or old-universe classification.
No new data families or data-universe expansion until microstructure qualification is complete.
Cannot claim microstructure-result as overlay unless signal IDs, entry timing, and base logic are preserved with microstructure applied only as veto/filter.
Cannot claim result as replacement unless compared as a separate snapshot against @1 on the same window.

stages.title: Freeze терминологии и correction log
stages.objective: Establish a clean v12 project with corrected terminology and immutable reference, ensuring overlay and replacement are never conflated.
actions: Open a new research_project for v12.
Record via research_record: v11 downgraded to watchlist; v10 mischaracterized as model-based veto overlay (actually rule-based replacement candidate).
Lock immutable reference: snapshot_id=active-signal-v1, version=1, symbol=BTCUSDT, anchor=1h, execution=5m.
Create research_map axes: track, side, route_type, threshold_origin, comparison_window, final_decision.

Create open-items register: true_overlay_track, replacement_track, threshold_provenance, same_window_ref1_runs, short_long_combined_split, cannibalization_audit, model_need_assessment, final_v12_verdict.
success_criteria: Clean v12 project exists with corrected terminology and full open-items register.

stages.title: Rebuild exact base @1 comparison frame
stages.objective: Reconstruct the canonical base @1 run on the exact lockbox window used in v10/v11 to serve as the sole reference for all v12 comparisons.
actions: Retrieve exact base snapshot active-signal-v1@1.
Identify and freeze the exact lockbox window used in v10/v11.
Run immutable base @1 on that window.
Persist full detail: trades list, timestamps, side split, PnL, PF, DD, win rate.
Save this run as the single canonical base_ref1_lockbox_run for v12.
success_criteria: One canonical base_ref1_lockbox_run exists with complete trade-level detail.

stages.title: Threshold provenance and selection discipline
stages.objective: Convert hand-tuned thresholds into a principled selection procedure with documented provenance for each candidate.
actions: Define candidate threshold families for cf_micro_imbalance_1h: quantile-based long/short cutoffs, fixed numeric cutoffs, symmetric and asymmetric cutoffs.
Separate windows: threshold selection window vs lockbox verification window.
Select at most 3 candidate threshold sets on selection window: conservative, balanced, aggressive.
Freeze all thresholds before any lockbox rerun.
Document the provenance of every threshold.
success_criteria: Frozen threshold sets with full provenance documentation exist.

stages.title: Build true overlay implementation over @1
stages.objective: Construct true overlay snapshots where microstructure acts only as a veto/filter gate without altering base signal IDs or entry logic.
actions: Build true overlay variant: base signal IDs and entry logic preserved; microstructure applied only as allow/block gate.
Create three separate overlays: short-only, long-only, combined.
Validate at snapshot level: signal IDs preserved, entry timing preserved, trade blocked only at decision moment, no retroactive replacement.
Save three separate overlay snapshots.
success_criteria: Three true-overlay snapshots exist with causal blocking verified and zero replacement.

stages.title: Simple-rule overlay tests on selection window
stages.objective: Determine whether true overlay shows any meaningful signal on the selection window before committing to lockbox runs.
actions: For each frozen threshold set, run on selection window: short-only true overlay, long-only true overlay, combined true overlay.
Compute: delta PnL vs base, delta PF vs base, delta DD vs base, removed trades, removed winners, removed losers, veto precision.
Promote to lockbox only variants with meaningful delta, low winner removal, and no coverage collapse.
success_criteria: Shortlist of true-overlay candidates promoted to lockbox testing.

stages.title: True overlay lockbox test against base @1
stages.objective: Obtain the definitive answer on whether true overlay works on the same lockbox window as the canonical base @1.
actions: For each surviving true-overlay candidate, run on the same lockbox window: base @1, base @1 + short-only overlay, base @1 + long-only overlay, base @1 + combined overlay.
Compute: trades, PnL, PF, DD, win rate, removed trades, removed winners, removed losers, ownership of improvement.
Record final verdict per variant.
success_criteria: Final verdict on true-overlay track with full same-window comparison against base @1.

stages.title: Honest replacement track vs base @1
stages.objective: If overlay is weak or impossible, test microstructure as an honest replacement-layer — new signal layer compared head-to-head against base @1.
actions: Build replacement snapshots: short-only, long-only, combined — each with own signal logic, threshold logic, and documented difference from base.
Explicitly label each as replacement (no overlay claim).
Run all replacement variants against base @1 on the same lockbox window.
Record: trades, PnL delta, PF delta, DD delta, overlap with base, better_than_ref1 flag.
success_criteria: Final verdict on replacement track with honest head-to-head comparison.
stages.gate_hint: Runs regardless of overlay outcome; both tracks must complete for full qualification.

stages.title: Cannibalization, ownership and regime analysis
stages.objective: Evaluate whether surviving variants improve via useful trade removal rather than coverage profile change or profitable cluster damage.
actions: For all surviving overlay and replacement variants compute: removed losers share, removed winners share, PnL of removed trades, strongest/weakest improved regime, weak-window repair, profitable cluster damage, side asymmetry.
Answer: does improvement come from removing bad trades, or from changing signal coverage profile?
Check regime behavior degradation in important modes.
success_criteria: Ownership/cannibalization map across all viable variants with regime-level detail.

stages.title: Does model layer add anything?
stages.objective: Determine whether ML models provide meaningful improvement over simple microstructure rules.
actions: For the best surviving route compare: simple bucket rule, threshold rule, logistic baseline, small CatBoost.
Compare only on fixed windows and fixed labels — no wide HPO.
Record selection quality, lockbox quality, extra value vs threshold, complexity-worth-it verdict.
success_criteria: Clear verdict: simple_rule_enough, model_adds_value, or model_not_worth_complexity.

stages.title: Optional gate: early-cut or directional scout
stages.objective: Conditionally open at most one further development branch only if v12 has already confirmed a viable route.
actions: Evaluate early-cut gate: open only if true overlay confirmed/strong watchlist and losers are detectable by early post-entry micro behavior.
Evaluate directional scout gate: open only if replacement confirmed/strong watchlist, monotonicity and regime behavior coherent, and signal works as entry timing layer.
Open at most one branch; lock the other.
success_criteria: Lock/unlock decision recorded for each conditional branch.
stages.gate_hint: Early-cut gate opens only if true overlay confirmed with detectable post-entry micro behavior. Directional scout gate opens only if replacement confirmed with coherent monotonicity and regime behavior. At most one branch may be opened.

stages.title: Финальный вердикт по v12
stages.objective: Deliver honest final classification of the microstructure-route into one of four statuses with clear next step.
actions: Aggregate all evidence from overlay track, replacement track, cannibalization audit, and model assessment.
Classify into one of: CONFIRMED TRUE OVERLAY, CONFIRMED REPLACEMENT, WATCHLIST, or REJECTED.
Record final verdict in research_record and update research_map.
Define clear next step for the chosen status.
success_criteria: Final route classification recorded with documented evidence chain and unambiguous next step.

warnings: v11 result was DOWNGRADED TO WATCHLIST — thresholds -0.155 and 0.164 are hand-tuned with undocumented provenance.
v10 result was mischaracterized as model-based veto overlay when it was actually a rule-based replacement candidate.
The two branches (overlay vs replacement) are strictly separate; one may confirm while the other fails.
